_publications._publicationTitle: Neural Crest-Specific TSC1 Deletion in Mice Leads to Sclerotic Craniofacial Bone Lesion.

_contextSnippet: Strikingly, the increase in frontal bone thickness in CKO mice was completely prevented...late rapamycin treatment did not prevent the increased frontal bone thickness
details: Rapamycin treatment completely prevented the increase in frontal bone thickness when administered early (1 week to 2 months) but not when administered late (1 month to 3 months)
